_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: Analysis of CNP-HRAS12V expressing peripheral nerve by electron microscopy shows unmyelinated fiber bundles that are slightly disorganized with a minor decrease in the number of axons per Remak bundle
details: Analysis by electron microscopy shows unmyelinated fiber bundles that are slightly disorganized with a minor decrease in the number of axons per Remak bundle.
